docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ESPINAL, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, MISAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINAL, RICHARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WAIVED) SERVED JAN-16-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINEDA, MISAEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF RICHARD ESPINAL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MISAEL PINEDA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BENICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
